positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a joyful forest picnic. The scene features a central picnic blanket spread on the grass, laden with stylized baskets, simple bread loaves, and vibrant berry clusters. Above the blanket, silhouetted shapes of friendly woodland creatures—a deer, a fox, and a rabbit—are interacting peacefully, framed by soft, stylized foliage and flowering branches. The artwork should utilize a limited, earthy color palette (sage green, mustard yellow, deep berry red, cream white) with strong, clean black outlines, giving it a retro mid-century modern cartoon aesthetic. Composition should be perfectly symmetrical and centered, designed for high contrast apparel printing. Flat design, clean silhouette, whimsical, detailed lines.
